case_title: CHEN, NINA et al vs. DAVIS, RUSSEL et al

NOTICE OF ARBITRATION HEARING SET FOR 2/19/98

PURSUANT TO CRC 1615 (C), THE AWARD OF THE ARBITRATOR IS HEREBY ENTERED AS JUDGMENT. IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CHEN, NINA LAM, NATHAN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT DAVIS, RUSSEL DAVIS, MELENDEZ $6,750.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $6,750.00, PLAINTIFF NINA CHEN TO RECOVER $3400.00 AND PLAINTIFF NATHAN LAM TO RECOVER $3350.00. COSTS TO PLAINTIFFS.
